app.name: LiveLingo
app.about.summary:
Local AI-powered translation assistant.
Real-time overlay for any application.
app.permission.title: System Permission Required
app.permission.body:
LiveLingo needs two macOS permissions to register global hotkeys:

1. Privacy & Security → Accessibility
2. Privacy & Security → Input Monitoring

Add and enable the terminal app you're using (e.g. Terminal, Cursor, iTerm) in BOTH lists.
After granting, restart the terminal and the app.
app.hotkey.registrationFailed.title: Hotkey Registration Failed
app.hotkey.registrationFailed.body:
Could not register "{0}".

The key combination may conflict with another application, or the required system permissions are not granted.

Please try a different key combination in Settings.
main.window.title: LiveLingo
main.hint.primary: Global hotkey registered. Press the shortcut while any app is focused to open the translation overlay.
main.hint.secondary: The overlay pops up over the active window.
dialog.about.title: About LiveLingo
dialog.update.title: Check for Updates
dialog.update.latest: You are on the latest version.
dialog.update.available.title: Update Available
dialog.update.available.body:
A new version ({0}) is available.
Download and restart now?
settings.title: Settings
settings.general.hotkeyHint: Click the field, then press a key combo
settings.translation.noInstalledModelsHi: No downloaded model available. Go to Models tab to download.
settings.models.huggingFaceHint: Downloads from Hugging Face use the read access token under the Advanced tab (create one at huggingface.co/settings/tokens). After changing the token, click Save, then retry download here.
settings.models.errorHuggingFaceAuth: Access denied by Hugging Face. Add a read token under Advanced → Access token, click Save, then retry download.
settings.advanced.huggingFaceTokenHint: Strongly recommended for Qwen and other gated GGUF weights. Create a read token at huggingface.co/settings/tokens, paste it here, then Save. Models tab downloads use this token.
settings.permission.title: Permission Check
settings.permission.allGranted: All permissions granted. Global hotkey should work.
settings.permission.hint: Add the terminal app (Terminal / Cursor / iTerm) to both lists, then restart.
overlay.error.targetNotConfigured: Error: Target language is not configured.
overlay.error.modelNotDownloaded: Error: Model not downloaded. Go to Settings → Models.
overlay.postprocess.fallback: AI post-processing model is not downloaded. Switched to translation-only. Download in Settings → Models.
overlay.voice.permissionDenied: Microphone permission denied. Grant access in system settings.
overlay.voice.platformNotSupported: Voice input is not supported on this platform.
toast.title: LiveLingo
toast.qwenModelFallback: {0} could not load on this device (often insufficient RAM). Switched to {1} for translation and AI features.
wizard.download.error: Download failed. Please copy the URL and download manually, then place it in the models directory.
wizard.download.errorAuth: Download failed: Hugging Face access denied. Add a read token under Settings → Advanced (huggingface.co/settings/tokens), click Save, then retry.
wizard.window.title: LiveLingo Setup
wizard.step0.title: Choose Languages
wizard.step0.description: Select the source language you type in and the target language for translation.
wizard.step1.title: Set Hotkey
wizard.step1.description: This keyboard shortcut opens the translation overlay. You can change it later in settings.
wizard.step2.title: Download Required Models
wizard.step2.description: LiveLingo downloads the baseline Qwen translation model from Hugging Face. This is a one-time download.
wizard.step2.huggingFace.intro: If the model is gated or you see access denied, add a Hugging Face read token under Settings → Advanced (huggingface.co/settings/tokens), click Save, then tap Download again.
wizard.step2.huggingFace.missingToken: No access token is saved in settings yet. Use the button below to open Advanced, paste your token, click Save in that window, then return here.
wizard.step2.huggingFace.tokenOk: A saved access token is configured; it will be sent for this download.
wizard.step2.huggingFace.openModelPage: Open model page (accept access if required)…
wizard.step2.card.title: Qwen3.5 9B
wizard.step2.card.subtitle: Baseline translation model (required)
